Design constraints from sealed inputs honored: every requiredCroBlocks slot reserved with conditional-omission behavior (trust grid, lead form, offer callout, sms CTA), 32-slot image plan mapped with representational-only policy and conditional gating intact, WCAG AA floor with computed contrast ratios recorded, mobile-first with singleton sticky call bar and 72px body reserve, menu prices omitted until owner confirmation.
